zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaïde De Sablé於1015年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易時，她的父親Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable16歲，母親Adelais16歲。她和Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1072年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉索維-德-藍德斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaïde De Sablé于1015年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable16岁，母亲Adelais16岁。她和Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1072年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉索維-德-藍德斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sablé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a sandy place, from sable ‘sand’.
French (Sablé): habitational name from a place so called in Sarthe.

variants.name: Zabel
meanings: German: from Middle High German zabel ‘board game’ (from Latin tabula), hence a nickname for a habitual game player.

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaïde De Sablé was born in 1015, in Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable, was 16 and her mother, Adelais, was 16. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. She died in 1072, in Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaïde De Sablé est née en 1015, à Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Adelais, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. Elle est décédée en 1072, à Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaïde De Sablé 1015 in Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable 16 und ihre Mutter Adelais 16. Sie hatte mit Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1072 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde De Sablé è nata il nel 1015 nel Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Adelais, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. Morì nel 1072, nel Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, 35310, Ille et: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインサイント-サウベウル-デス-ランズ
ja.lifeSummary: Adélaïde De Sabléが1015年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sableは16歳，母Adelaisは16歳であった。彼女はMéen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougèresとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1072年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインサイント-サウベウル-デス-ランズで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde De Sablé(이)가 1015년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelais(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1072년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 세인트-소브우-데스-랜데스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde De Sablé nasceu em 1015, em Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Adelais, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. Ela faleceu em 1072, em Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaïde De Sablé родилась в 1015 г. в местности пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelais, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. Она умерла в 1072 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-дес-ландесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaïde De Sablé nació en 1015, en Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey de Sable Vicomte de Sable, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Adelais, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères. Murió en 1072, en Saint-Sauveur-des-Landes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
